title: Classification accuracy + urgency on the labeled corpus meets `NFR-001`; report per-category confusion.
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "TEST-001", "Test": "Classification accuracy + urgency on the labeled corpus meets `NFR-001`; report per-category confusion.", "Kind": "Eval (corpus)", "Verifies": "`FR-002`, `NFR-001`, `AC-001`", "Phase": "PH-1"}}

title: Every generated draft either cites a retrieved source for each claim or is marked deferred; injected "unanswerable" emails always defer.
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "TEST-002", "Test": "Every generated draft either cites a retrieved source for each claim or is marked deferred; injected \"unanswerable\" emails always defer.", "Kind": "Behavioral + negative", "Verifies": "`FR-004`, `INV-002`, `AC-002`", "Phase": "PH-1"}}

title: No send occurs on any path without a recorded human approval; attempt-to-send-without-approval is rejected and logged.
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "TEST-003", "Test": "No send occurs on any path without a recorded human approval; attempt-to-send-without-approval is rejected and logged.", "Kind": "Negative (safety)", "Verifies": "`FR-006`, `INV-001`, `AC-003`", "Phase": "PH-1"}}

title: No PII appears in any outbound tool call, model prompt, or log line across a PII-laden test set.
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "TEST-004", "Test": "No PII appears in any outbound tool call, model prompt, or log line across a PII-laden test set.", "Kind": "Negative (safety)", "Verifies": "`INV-003`, `NFR-003`, `AC-004`", "Phase": "PH-1"}}

title: Every processed email yields a complete, append-only audit trace; traces cannot be mutated after write.
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "TEST-005", "Test": "Every processed email yields a complete, append-only audit trace; traces cannot be mutated after write.", "Kind": "Behavioral", "Verifies": "`FR-007`, `INV-004`, `AC-005`", "Phase": "PH-1"}}

title: A run that would exceed the iteration or cost cap is aborted (fails closed); no off-allow-list tool is ever called.
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "TEST-006", "Test": "A run that would exceed the iteration or cost cap is aborted (fails closed); no off-allow-list tool is ever called.", "Kind": "Negative (safety)", "Verifies": "`INV-005`, `NFR-004`, `ADR-0003`", "Phase": "PH-1"}}
